_: Bright-star catalog — all naked-eye stars to mag<=6.0. Each star: {name(proper or null), bayer(Greek/Flamsteed + IAU constellation abbrev, or null), ra(hours,J2000), dec(deg,J2000), mag(V), spectral, constellation(IAU 3-letter), constellation_he}.
source: HYG Database v4.1 (hygdata_v41.csv), David Nash / astronexus — github.com/astronexus/HYG-Database. Compiled from Hipparcos, Yale Bright Star Catalogue (5th ed.), and Gliese catalogs.
license: HYG Database is released under CC BY-SA 4.0 (Hipparcos/Yale/Gliese underlying data public-domain).
constellation_he_note: constellation_he from app/data/constellations.json (d3-celestial figures) extended with Hebrew Wikipedia names for the remaining IAU constellations.
